title: Project Summary/Abstract
generation_instructions: Write a concise project summary that: 1. States the long-term objectives and specific aims. 2. Describes the research design and methods. 3. Explains the project's relevance to public health. 4. Avoids proprietary information.
search_queries: how to write a project summary

title: Specific Aims
generation_instructions: Write a specific aims section that: 1. Concisely states the goals of the proposed research. 2. Summarizes the expected outcomes and their impact. 3. Lists the specific objectives of the research. 4. Highlights the significance of the aims.

title: Research Strategy
generation_instructions: Write a detailed research strategy section that: 1. Explains the significance of the problem and its impact. 2. Highlights the innovative aspects of the approach. 3. Describes the research design, methods, and analyses. 4. Includes a timeline and plan for clinical translation. 5. Addresses the five points related to imaging improvement, resolution increase, clinical setting, clinical care, and inner ear pathologies. 6. Includes a plan to conduct analyses to evaluate differences which may impact the intervention outcome(s) among sex/gender subgroups.
search_queries: analysis of sex/gender differences in research

title: Progress Report Publication List
generation_instructions: List the titles and complete references to all publications, manuscripts, patents, and other printed materials that have resulted from the project since it was last reviewed. Include NIHMS or PMC reference numbers for articles under the Public Access Policy.
search_queries: how to cite publications in NIH grant

title: Project Narrative
generation_instructions: Describe the relevance of this research to public health in three sentences. Explain how the research would contribute to fundamental knowledge about living systems and/or the application of that knowledge to enhance health, lengthen life, and reduce illness and disability.
